items.title: NASA’s Psyche Spacecraft Captures Mind-Bending Month-Long Timelapse of Mars
items.summary: Throughout May, NASA's Psyche spacecraft approached and flew away from Mars, coming within just 2,864 miles (4,609 kilometers) of the Red Planet during its closest approach. A brand-new timelapse vide…

items.title: Annie Leibovitz Launches Copyright Lawsuit Over Her Image of Justin and Hailey Bieber
items.summary: Photographer Annie Leibovitz has sued a website for allegedly using her photograph of Justin and Hailey Bieber without permission, seeking "substantial damages." [Read More]

items.title: Hugging Face confirms breach affected internal datasets and credentials, urges users to take action
items.summary: Hugging Face is urging users to rotate any access tokens stored on the platform and review account activity.

items.title: A Stolen Dove Takes Flight Again
items.summary: A participatory artwork honors Alex Odeh, the cheerfully sinister worlds of Trevor Winkfield, and why is Zendaya wearing 3,000-year-old Iranian artifacts?

items.title: Watch Madonna, the Muppets, and More Perform at 2026 World Cup Final Halftime
items.summary: The 11-minute spectacle included performances by Shakira, Justin Bieber, BTS, Burna Boy, and Coldplay’s Chris Martin

items.title: L7 Bassist Jennifer Finch Dies at 59
items.summary: The grunge musician died on Saturday after being diagnosed with an aggressive form of brain cancer

items.title: Trump Shrinks Utah National Monuments by 90%
items.summary: The administration’s cuts to the Grand Staircase-Escalante and Bears Ears national monuments include sacred Indigenous lands and archaeologically rich sites.
